reasoning: We're addressing your lactate clearance by honing in on over-unders which directly target your power drop-off from 5 to 20 minutes. Your last ride shows a developing aerobic base at 162.6W, but we need to push your endurance for the 58-64 minute main climb on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.description: Repeat over-unders: 5 mins at 201-218W followed by 5 mins at 242-256W. Total 4 sets.
